news_items.headline: Skubal: Tigers must rise before deadline 'or else'...
news_items.summary: Tarik Skubal has made it clear as the Tigers continue to fall further out of contention as the clock ticks down to the trade deadline: "Play better baseball or else."

news_items.headline: Sources: MLB proposes amateur-entry overhaul
news_items.summary: MLB's proposed changes include cutting amateur signing bonuses by more than $150M, making high school players ineligible for the draft and instituting an international draft.

news_items.headline: Angels' Trout suffers hamstring injury, put on IL
news_items.summary: Angels center fielder Mike Trout, who is batting .234 with 17 home runs and 36 RBIs this season, has been placed on the injured list with a hamstring injury.

news_items.headline: Royals' Witt (knee) exits after making sliding pla...
news_items.summary: Kansas City shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. left the Royals' game with the Cardinals on Thursday night because of right knee discomfort after making a sliding play in the field.

news_items.headline: Yankees' Chisholm exits after foul ball to groin
news_items.summary: Yankees second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. exited Thursday's game against the White Sox after a foul ball ricocheted off the ground and into his groin area.

news_items.headline: Buxton addresses trade speculation: 'I'm a Twin'
news_items.summary: Amid speculation that he could be dealt ahead of the Aug. 3 trade deadline, Minnesota center fielder Byron Buxton reiterated Thursday, "I'm a Twin."

news_items.headline: Braves acquire Bart from Pirates for Stratton
news_items.summary: The Braves acquired catcher Joey Bart from the Pirates for right-handed pitcher Hunter Stratton on Thursday night.

news_items.headline: Time's Up! MLB nixes clock for Home Run Derby
news_items.summary: Major League Baseball is eliminating the clock for next month's All-Star Home Run Derby at Citizens Bank Park in Philadelphia.

news_items.headline: The good, the bad as the Padres split six games
A’s Beat Angels 5-0
news_items.summary: A great way to start the series

news_items.summary: Myrtle Beach scores 12 runs in one inning. Knoxville fights back into a 1st place tie.

news_items.headline: Bobby Witt Jr. homers before leaving with knee injury in Royals’ 14-6 win over Cardinals
news_items.summary: Bobby Witt Jr. hit the first of Kansas City’s three home runs before leaving with a sore right knee.

news_items.headline: Braves trade Hunter Stratton to Pirates in exchange for Joey Bart
news_items.summary: Here comes another new catcher for the Braves

news_items.headline: Sluggers bound to benefit from changes in Derby format
Mets Notes: Key to big seventh inning against Phillies, decision to use Eric Wagaman
news_items.summary: Following the Mets' 6-4 win over the Phillies on Thursday night, manager Carlos Mendoza and the players spoke about the big seventh inning and Francisco Lindor's impending return.

news_items.headline: Andrew Benintendi's pinch-hit grand slam leads White Sox to 5-1 win over Yankees
news_items.summary: The Yankees also lost Jazz Chisholm Jr. in the fourth inning after he hit a foul ball that ricocheted into a delicate area.
